overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player character walks along a multi-lane road past a burning vehicle, with neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible in the distance against an orange sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with burning vehicle wreckage

events.description: moving away from the burning car wreckage onto the open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past a burning vehicle on the street corner, observing the wreckage before continuing along the sidewalk

entered.detail: wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames with smoke rising
large dark rectangular industrial structure with red light strip
scattered wooden planks and cardboard on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a street corner at dusk with a burning car wreckage in the center of the frame. The player character walks past the flaming vehicle, moving from the asphalt road onto the concrete sidewalk. Industrial structures and scattered debris mark the scene, with the city skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban boulevard with panoramic city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide sidewalk with the neon-lit city skyline ahead, observing the distant architecture

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows against the orange sunset
tall buildings covered with colorful glowing advertisements and holographic displays
large elevated highway or bridge structure spanning across the horizon
multiple overhead electrical cables stretching across the street

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban boulevard with an expansive view of the Night City skyline against a warm orange sunset. Neon billboards glow on the left while power lines stretch overhead. The player walks steadily along the concrete sidewalk, moving away from the industrial corner toward the dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with industrial buildings and pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians who are walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete industrial structure with smoke rising from the top
metal railing running along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: As the player continues walking, the scene transitions to a section with industrial buildings on the right emitting smoke. Pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk. The metal fence runs along the right side while the city skyline remains visible ahead, and the overpass structure disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with holographic advertisements and piping

agents.ego_description: walking past a glowing green holographic advertisement and large industrial piping, following a pedestrian with a red hat

notable_agents.action: person wearing a red hat walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic display showing abstract imagery
large cylindrical metal pipes running along the building exterior
tall palm tree growing alongside the industrial building
raised highway or monorail structure with fencing on the right side

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a section featuring prominent industrial infrastructure, including large metal pipes and a glowing green holographic advertisement on the right. A palm tree stands out against the industrial backdrop. A pedestrian with a red hat walks ahead in the same direction, while vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection with traffic control infrastructure

events.description: approaching a red traffic light at the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the intersection as vehicles pass by on the road, approaching the red traffic signal

entered.detail: horizontal traffic light gantry with red signals illuminated
safety railings along the sidewalk edge near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an intersection marked by a traffic light structure with red signals. The player continues walking along the sidewalk bordered by metal barriers, with the industrial buildings and holographic ads now behind. Vehicles move along the multi-lane road as the traffic light looms ahead, signaling the approach to a crossing point in the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a chaotic industrial street corner toward a structured urban intersection under a deepening orange sunset. It begins by moving past the wreckage of a burning car on an asphalt road, transitioning from the debris-strewn corner onto a concrete sidewalk. As the camera advances, the view expands into a wide boulevard where neon billboards glow and the futuristic Night City skyline looms ahead, before shifting past smoking industrial buildings and oncoming pedestrians. The path then leads through a corridor of heavy infrastructure featuring large metal pipes and a glowing green holographic advertisement, passing a solitary palm tree and a pedestrian in a red hat. Finally, the scene culminates as the camera approaches a traffic intersection, leaving the industrial zone behind to face a red signal light over the multi-lane road.
